descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Red Deer Rustlers 11-4 in Centennial Cup western semi-final playoff opener.
descriptionLong: Richmond Sockeyes dominated Red Deer Rustlers 11-4 in the opening game of their Centennial Cup western semi-final series on April 7, 1987. Red Deer coach Larry Billows called it the worst game his team had played, citing poor defensive effort and goaltender Glen Furgason's weak performance. Sockeye goaltender Frank Romeo expressed surprise at the lopsided victory. Game two was scheduled for April 8 at Richmond Arena with Richmond leading the best-of-seven series 1-0.

attribution.headline: Red Deer Rustlers embarrassed in Centennial Cup semi-final loss to Richmond Sockeyes
